texts.orig: Lake Nakuru Lodge: Bird Watchers Paradise.
texts.text: Lake Nakuru Lodge: Bird Watchers Paradise.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: You don't have to worry about the game drives Just relax in your room or at the balcony and watch nature in its best (Wildlife & Landscape).
texts.text: You don't have to worry about the game drives Just relax in your room or at the balcony and watch nature in its best (Wildlife & Landscape).
